name: otel
description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation — auto-instrumentation, Pino structured logging, category-based filtering

health_checks.name: otel-instrumentation-exists
health_checks.command: test -f instrumentation.ts || test -f src/instrumentation.ts || test -f instrumentation.py

verification: test -f instrumentation.ts || test -f src/instrumentation.ts || test -f instrumentation.py
